changes.description: Replaced invalid agent role names (code-reviewer, security-scanner, etc.) in agentTeams.defaultCompositions with valid .claude/agents/ references (implementer, debugger, resolver).
Extracted _is_positive_int(val, *, allow_zero=False) helper. Replaced ~14 occurrences of expanded bool-type-check patterns across config parsers and validators.
Removed self-referential 'Apply .claude/skills/performance-review.md' at line 38. Replaced with direct 'Performance checklist:' heading.
